name: Brethren of the Bolt
inspire:
Each friendly fighter starts the game Inspired.

Immediately after an Action step in which a friendly fighter was a conducting fighter, Inspire that fighter.

UNINSPIRE
Immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack, Uninspire that friendly fighter.

abilities.name: Holy Capacitors
abilities.rulesText: Subtract 1 from the distance between a friendly attacker and their target for each friendly fighter between the attacker and the target. Those friendly fighters are conducting.

abilities.name: Fulminating Hymn
abilities.flavorText: The chants of the Brethren seems to spark holy lightning.
abilities.rulesText:
Pick one of the following abilities at the start of the combat phase. While there are two or more friendly fighters, each fighter can use that ability.

Charged Aura: Friendly fighters cannot be Flanked.
Reckless Abandon: Each time a friendly fighter would be given a Charge token, you can inflict 1 damage on that fighter instead of giving them a Charge token.
Faithful Dynamos: Friendly fighter's weapons have Stagger ({icon:stagger}).

abilities.name: Crackling Burst
abilities.flavorText: Filled with zealous dynamism, the Brethren advance.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Pick a friendly fighter. That fighter Moves. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Heaven's Charge
abilities.flavorText: Chanting, the cultists 'share' their electrical boon.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after your Action step. Pick a friendly fighter. Uninspire that fighter, then inflict 1 damage on an adjacent enemy fighter. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Coruscating Revival
abilities.flavorText: The kiss of lightning invigorates the brethren.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after your Action step. Pick a friendly fighter that was conducting during that step. Heal that fighter. You can only use this ability once per game.
